rationale: X independently verified the exact reasoning the human reviewer gave (both submit_initial/submit_update reject list prompts identically, so gating unwrap on already_submitted was the actual bug) and correctly reaches APPROVE, matching the real outcome (two LGTM approvals). Y never confirms its central assumption (whether ZImagePipeline.forward returns DiffusionOutput vs tuple), explicitly notes 'budget exhausted' and unresolved blockers, then still issues REQUEST CHANGES with speculative asks (docstring wording, None-check comment, assert) that misread a clean, already-approved bugfix. Y's output is also degraded by verbatim triplication of the same review text.
